zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret De Waldeshef於1270年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾時，她的父親Walter Waldegrave-1歲，母親Elizabeth de Neville-20歲。她於大約1289年與Sir Ralph Shirley在英國英格蘭德比夏爾莎莉結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1327年在她的家鄉享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾艾廷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret De Waldeshef于1270年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾时，她的父亲Walter Waldegrave-1岁，母亲Elizabeth de Neville-20岁。她于大约1289年与Sir Ralph Shirley在英国英格兰德比夏爾莎莉结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1327年在她的家乡享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾艾廷頓。

English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret De Waldeshef was born in 1270, in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Walter Waldegrave, was -1 and her mother, Elizabeth de Neville, was -20. She married Sir Ralph Shirley about 1289, in Shirley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1327, in her hometown, at the age of 57, and was buried in Ettington, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret De Waldeshef est née en 1270, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter Waldegrave, avait -1 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Neville, avait -20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph Shirley environ 1289, à Shirley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1327, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Ettington, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret De Waldeshef(이)가 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Waldegrave(은)는 -1세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Neville(은)는 -20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 실를리에서 Sir Ralph Shirley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 틴그턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret De Waldeshef родилась в 1270 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Walter Waldegrave было -1 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Neville, -20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph Shirley около 1289 г. в местности ширли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1327 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности эттингтон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания.
